creator: taitg@digitalimagination.com
text:
I installed the binary compatibility distributions through
'/stand/sysinstall/' and all of my password files were destroyed. All the
accounts from the system including the root password were deleted and the
'htpasswd' passwords were missing as well. I retried the same type of
update on freeBSD 4.5 current-release i386 and it was the same issue.
Not sure if you call this a bug, but maybe at least a warning to the
server admin that this may happen before updating the binary
compatibility distributions.

How-To-Repeat:       Build a server using the freeBSD operating system. Configure
accounts as well as set the root password. Install a few programs
(Apache, mySQL, GLIB, etc...). Run '/stand/install/', 'configure',
'distributions', and install the binary compatibility packages.
